title: polystichum travancoricum
intro: Polystichum travancoricum, a species of fern known as a 'tree fern', is a flowering plant native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India. The medicinal properties of Polystichum travancoricum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In Ayurvedic medicine, Polystichum travancoricum is used to prepare herbal preparations like decoctions and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
